'''Corell Muntique''' was a [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] of [[House Calipsa]] and has represented [[Calipsa]] in the annual [[Vor-cal]] safari hunt. He owned a domesticated [[vornskr]] that he called [[Crill]]. Crill was trained as a hunting dog.<ref name="LOTE" />

==Sources==
